mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, ORDER_STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, ORDER_DATE FROM PERF_ORDER WHERE CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, ORDER_STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, ORDER_DATE FROM PERF_ORDER WHERE CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE #{keyword} || '%' LIMIT 100
SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, ORDER_STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, ORDER_DATE FROM PERF_ORDER ORDER BY ORDER_DATE DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT o.ORDER_ID, o.CUSTOMER_NAME, o.ORDER_STATUS, o.TOTAL_AMOUNT, d.DETAIL_ID, d.PRODUCT_ID, d.PRODUCT_NAME, d.QUANTITY, d.UNIT_PRICE, d.LINE_AMOUNT FROM (SELECT * FROM PERF_ORDER LIMIT #{limit}) o JOIN PERF_ORDER_DETAIL d ON o.ORDER_ID = d.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN PERF_PRODUCT p ON d.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID ORDER BY o.ORDER_ID, d.DETAIL_ID

SELECT o.ORDER_STATUS, COUNT(*) AS ORDER_COUNT, SUM(o.TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_AMOUNT_SUM, LISTAGG(DISTINCT p.PRODUCT_NAME, ', ') AS PRODUCT_NAMES FROM PERF_ORDER o JOIN PERF_ORDER_DETAIL d ON o.ORDER_ID = d.ORDER_ID JOIN PERF_PRODUCT p ON d.PRODUCT_ID = p.PRODUCT_ID WHERE o.ORDER_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY o.ORDER_STATUS ORDER BY o.ORDER_STATUS
SELECT ORDER_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, ORDER_STATUS, TOTAL_AMOUNT, ORDER_DATE FROM PERF_ORDER
